label: Total population (ACS, 2020–24 avg)
desc: Total residents in the tract — ACS 2020–24 5-year survey estimate. Has a margin of error; the 2020 Decennial count below is more precise but 5 years older.

label: Total population (2020 Decennial count)
desc: Total residents in the tract from the 2020 Decennial Census — a 100% count, not a survey estimate. No margin of error. Roughly 5 years stale by now.

label: Population density
desc: ACS residents per square mile of land area.

label: Median age
desc: Half of residents are older than this age, half younger.

label: Share under 18
desc: Share of residents younger than 18.

label: Share 65 and over
desc: Share of residents 65 years or older.

label: Share under 18 (2020 count)
desc: Share under 18 — 2020 Decennial 100% count, no margin of error.

label: Share 65 and over (2020 count)
desc: Share 65 and over — 2020 Decennial 100% count, no margin of error.

label: White (non-Hispanic)
desc: Share identifying as white alone and not Hispanic or Latino.

label: Black (non-Hispanic)
desc: Share identifying as Black or African American alone and not Hispanic or Latino.

label: Asian (non-Hispanic)
desc: Share identifying as Asian alone and not Hispanic or Latino.

label: Hispanic or Latino (any race)
desc: Share identifying as Hispanic or Latino, of any race.

label: White non-Hispanic (2020 count)
desc: Share identifying as White alone, non-Hispanic — 2020 Decennial Census 100% count, not a survey estimate. More precise than the ACS version above but 5 years older.

label: Black non-Hispanic (2020 count)
desc: Share identifying as Black or African American alone, non-Hispanic — 2020 Decennial 100% count.

label: Asian non-Hispanic (2020 count)
desc: Share identifying as Asian alone, non-Hispanic — 2020 Decennial 100% count.

label: Hispanic or Latino (2020 count)
desc: Share identifying as Hispanic or Latino, of any race — 2020 Decennial 100% count.

label: Foreign-born
desc: Share of residents born outside the United States, not counting those born abroad to American parents (who Census classifies as native).

label: Not a U.S. citizen
desc: Share of residents who are foreign-born and have not naturalized — the closest publicly available proxy for the undocumented population, but it OVER-counts that population. It includes lawful permanent residents (green-card holders), visa holders (students, H-1B, etc.), refugees, asylees, and TPS recipients. Nationally about a quarter of foreign-born residents are undocumented; in NYC, Center for Migration Studies estimates roughly a third of non-citizens are undocumented. See methodology for the full caveat.

label: Non-English at home
desc: Share of residents 5+ who speak a language other than English at home.

label: Total households
desc: Count of occupied housing units.

label: Average household size
desc: Average number of people living in each household.

label: Owner-occupied homes
desc: Share of occupied units that are owner-occupied.

label: Median household income
desc: Median household income in the past 12 months, in 2024 inflation-adjusted dollars (ACS B19013).

label: Poverty rate
desc: Share of residents below the federal poverty line, among those for whom poverty status was determined (excludes institutional group quarters).

label: Households under $30k
desc: Share of households earning less than $30,000.

label: Households $30k–$60k
desc: Share of households earning $30,000 to $59,999.

label: Households $60k–$100k
desc: Share of households earning $60,000 to $99,999.

label: Households $100k–$150k
desc: Share of households earning $100,000 to $149,999.

label: Households $150k+
desc: Share of households earning $150,000 or more.

label: Receiving SNAP
desc: Share of households that received SNAP / food-stamp benefits in the past year.

label: Median gross rent
desc: Median monthly gross rent for renter-occupied units paying cash rent (excludes no-cash-rent units).

label: Median home value
desc: Median value of owner-occupied housing units, by self-report (ACS B25077).

label: Median rent burden
desc: Median gross rent as a percentage of household income in the past 12 months (ACS B25071).

label: Major-felony rate
desc: All seven major felonies — murder, rape, robbery, felony assault, burglary, grand larceny, grand larceny of motor vehicle — per 1,000 residents over the most recent 12 months (NYPD).

label: Violent-crime rate
desc: Murder, rape, robbery, and felony assault per 1,000 residents over the most recent 12 months (NYPD).

label: Property-crime rate
desc: Burglary, grand larceny, and grand larceny of motor vehicle per 1,000 residents over the most recent 12 months (NYPD).

label: Bachelor's degree or higher
desc: Share of residents 25+ holding at least a bachelor's degree.

label: High-school diploma only
desc: Share of residents 25+ whose highest credential is a high-school diploma or equivalent.

label: K-12 students in public school
desc: Share of kindergarten-through-12th-grade students enrolled in public school.

label: K-12 students in private school
desc: Share of kindergarten-through-12th-grade students enrolled in private school (Census combines parochial and independent private here).

label: K-12 students (count, by residence)
desc: Total K-12 students living in the tract (ACS, by student residence).

label: Public-school K-12 enrolled (by school location)
desc: K-12 students enrolled at public schools located in this tract, from NYC DOE Demographic Snapshot rosters. Counts by school location, not student residence — so the number is high in tracts that contain a large school and zero in tracts with no school.

label: Public K-12 schools in tract
desc: Number of NYC DOE public K-12 schools physically located in the tract (includes charters operating under DOE; excludes private/parochial).

label: In labor force (16+)
desc: Share of residents 16+ in the civilian or armed-forces labor force.

label: Unemployment rate
desc: Share of the civilian labor force (16+) that is unemployed — the standard BLS unemployment-rate definition.

label: Commute by public transit
desc: Share of commuters using public transportation, excluding taxi.

label: Walked to work
desc: Share of commuters who walked to work.

label: Worked from home
desc: Share of workers who worked primarily from home.

label: Households with no vehicle
desc: Share of households that have no vehicle available.

label: Households with 3+ vehicles
desc: Share of households with three or more vehicles available.

label: Average vehicles per household
desc: Average number of vehicles per household (the "4 or more" bucket is counted as 4.5).

label: Homeowners without a vehicle
desc: Share of owner-occupied households that have no vehicle — a distinctively dense-city pattern.

label: Renters without a vehicle
desc: Share of renter-occupied households that have no vehicle.

label: Harris vote share, 2024 president
desc: Kamala Harris share of the two-party (D+R) vote in the November 2024 general election. NYC BoE ED-level results, aggregated to tracts by ED centroid.

label: Trump vote share, 2024 president
desc: Donald Trump share of the two-party (D+R) vote in the November 2024 general election. NYC BoE ED-level results.

label: Major-party votes cast, 2024 president
desc: Total D+R votes cast for president in 2024 in this tract.

label: Biden vote share, 2020 president
desc: Joe Biden share of the two-party (D+R) vote in the November 2020 general election. NYC BoE ED-level results.

label: Trump vote share, 2020 president
desc: Donald Trump share of the two-party (D+R) vote in the November 2020 general election.

label: Major-party votes cast, 2020 president
desc: Total D+R votes cast for president in 2020 in this tract.

label: Democratic shift, 2020 → 2024 president
desc: Change in the Democratic share of the two-party presidential vote from 2020 to 2024. Negative = Republican gain; positive = Democratic gain.

label: Mamdani vote share, 2025 mayor
desc: Zohran Mamdani share of the three-way (Mamdani + Cuomo + Sliwa) vote in the November 2025 general mayoral election.

label: Cuomo vote share, 2025 mayor
desc: Andrew Cuomo share of the three-way mayoral vote in 2025 (running as an independent on his own line).

label: Sliwa vote share, 2025 mayor
desc: Curtis Sliwa (Republican) share of the three-way mayoral vote in 2025.

label: Major-candidate votes cast, 2025 mayor
desc: Total Mamdani + Cuomo + Sliwa votes cast in this tract in 2025.

label: Adams vote share, 2021 mayor
desc: Eric Adams (Democrat) share of the two-major-candidate (Adams + Sliwa) vote in the November 2021 general mayoral election.

label: Sliwa vote share, 2021 mayor
desc: Curtis Sliwa (Republican) share of the two-major-candidate vote in 2021.

label: Major-candidate votes cast, 2021 mayor
desc: Total Adams + Sliwa votes cast in this tract in 2021.

label: Veterans (18+)
desc: Share of civilians 18+ who are veterans.

label: No internet access
desc: Share of households with no internet access at all — neither a paid subscription nor any other means of getting online (ACS B28002_013).
